Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Etelaee konande masael moshtarak. Mardomet ro pida kon. Hamrah amal kon.

Footer.mission: Taghiir dadane bishtar va behtar dar omre khod ta jaye ke tasavvor mikonim.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Motavasselem OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: Taghiir na bayad sedaye boland dashte bashe ke khodros bashe
Home.description: Mardomie peida kon ke masael-e shoma ra dashte bashand. Hamrah amal kon. Quiet Riots mardomro dore masael-e moshtarak jam mikonad va shekaiat ha ro be amal-e jame'ee tabdil mikonad.
Home.riotersFunny: {count} sherkatkonnande in ra khande dar amadan
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Har nokte taab-aloodat ro search kon — gharar, internet, salamat, ab-o hava. Agar vojood dashte bashe, ma neshan midam chand nafar dige ham ine ra darand.
Home.useThePivotDesc: Same masale ra dar tamame sazeman ha, ya hame masael dar yek sazeman bebin. Mese raghsan-e tango ke samte taghiir midahan.
Home.takeActionDesc: Ideha, amalha, va jame'e — khasiye shode bar asase vaqt va maharat-e shoma. Amalha-ye kuchek ta taghiirat-e bozorgmizanand.
Home.missionQuote: "Taghiir dadane bishtar va behtar dar omre khod ta jaye ke tasavvor mikonim."
Home.basedOn: Bar asase ketab-e 2014 Quiet Riots neveshteh Simon Darling

IssueDetail.riotReelsDesc: Videohaye bakhande va heme-bazie ke rooh-e in Quiet Riot ra gabze mikonad.
IssueDetail.expertsDesc: Javan-mardan-e shoor ke aomq-tar miravand — motarjem, motekhasas, rahbar-e rasaneh, motavasseley hokmi.
IssueDetail.pendingBanner: Quiet Riot-e in dar barresi ast — shoma mitavanid shood avalige konid va nazer-e khode ra share konid dar hale barresi.

OrgDetail.paretoDesc: Chand masale kaafi ast ke 80 dersan-e hame shekaiat ra takht konad. Masael-e avale zir bar asase tedade mardomie ke ta asir mishan rank-deh shodeh and.
OrgDetail.gatherEvidenceDesc: Anche mikhafatan ba {orgName} miresh documnet kon.

Auth.errorVerification: Link Wored Shoden Mote-allaq Shode Ya Ghabl Istifade Shode.
Auth.emailBody: Bar Dkhmeh-ye Zir Klik Konid Ta Wared Hesaab-e Khod Shavid. In Link dar Moad-e 24 Saat Qaza Mishavad.
Auth.emailIgnore: Agar In Email Ra Taleb Nakarde Boodid, Mitonid Ba Amniat An Ra Nadeide Girid.
Auth.codeSent: Yek Kod-e Tasdiq be WhatsApp-e Shoma Ferestade Shode.

Auth.noPasswordSet: Rahguze Tanzim Neshode. Az Magic Link Istifade Konid ya Rahguze-ye Khod Ra Dar Profile Tanzim Konid.

CookieConsent.title: Tarjih-haye cookie
CookieConsent.description: Ma az cookie ha baraye baghimandan-e shoma login shode va bihtar kardan-e tajrobe-ye shoma estefade mikonim. Cookie-haye analytics komesk mikonand ta ma fahm konim site chetor estefade mishavad.
CookieConsent.essentialDescription: Baraye kar kardan-e site lazem ast. Nemitavanad gheyrefeaal shavad.
CookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Komesk mikonad ta fahm konim chetor site ra estefade mikonid ta behtari dahim.

SuggestPage.title: Yek Quiet Riot-e jadid pishnahad kon
SuggestPage.subtitle: Mas'ale-ye khodet ra peyda nemikonid? Yek Quiet Riot-e jadid pishnahad konid va ma on ra barresi khahim kard.

SuggestForm.namePlaceholder: Meslan Mobile Data Costs, Pothole Crisis...
SuggestForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Darbareye in mas'ale be ma goftogoo kon...
SuggestForm.publicRecognition: Man ra be onvaan First Quiet Rioter neshoon be (bozorgsal baraye baghimondegi)
SuggestForm.submit: Inin Quiet Riot ra Pishnahad Kon
SuggestForm.successMessage: Quiet Riot-e shoma eknoon dar otagh-e entezar ast. Yek Setup Guide on ra dar yek saat barresi khahad kard. Mitavani shavahed jam kon va fekr-e khodet ra ba'ad az barresi sherk kon.

RejectionReasons.title: Cheraa Quiet Riot ha Red Mishavand
RejectionReasons.subtitle: Fahmidan-e barresi process
RejectionReasons.intro: Har pishnahad baraye Quiet Riot-e jadid az taraf-e Setup Guide barresi mishavad ta muteaqin shavad ke ba platform hamrah shavad va mitavanad farq halal konand. Inja dahim-i dalail-e red shodan-e pishnahad:
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingTitle: Nazdik be Yek Quiet Riot-e Mavjud
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP1: Agar pishnahad-e shoma kheili shebih-e Quiet Riot-e mavjudarche, ma pishnahad-e shoma ra be Quiet Riot-e mavjud adgham mikonim. In community-ra focused negah midarad va jodayi-ra jolo migired. Har che biya'ntar az yek Quiet Riot ra deshan ghavat bashe, asar-e bozorgtar khahad bud.
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP2: Vaqti ke in atefaq biyoftad, shoma be khodemkari be Quiet Riot-e mavjud ilava khahid shod ta beshonid shaften az hamanhala.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP1: Quiet Riot ha darbareye mas'ale-haye moshtarak hastand, na taargeti-ye aftrad. Ma bar roye mas'ale-haye sistemi tameroz mikonim — chiz-haye meslaan broadband-e bad, enteshaar-e hazine-ye energy, ya salamat-e na-kafi — na shhaye shakhsi ba aftrad-e khaas.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP2: Agar az yek nafe khasi ya public figure-e moteassefer hastand, talab-e mase-ye asli ra jaye khaas kardehha. Meslan, ba'ad az taargeting CEO, pishnahad Quiet Riot-e darbareye amal-haye sherkat ra konid.
RejectionReasons.illegalP1: Ma nemitavnim Quiet Riot-haye ke tadevon yaa tanzim-e fealiyat-haye gheireqanuni konand host konim. In shumel har chi ke qanoon-e omomi ra nagoosh konand, khoshonat ra tadevon konand, ya mitavnad aftrad-e khatar miandaze.
RejectionReasons.otherP1: Beshtar vaghab pishnahad-e khor mitavanad baraye dalail-e digar ne fit shavad — shayad kheili ebhaam ast, ya Setup Guide need be tavzih biyafzatar darad. In mavarede, shoma payamire tavzih khahid khord ke cheraa va cheh mitonid konid.
RejectionReasons.whatNextIntro: Agar pishnahad-e shoma red shavad, hamisha mitavani:
RejectionReasons.reframe: Dobare sakhtan va talash konin — naam ya tavzih ra tabdil konin ta behtarin hamrah shode ba guideline ha
RejectionReasons.joinExisting: Be Quiet Riot-e mavjud bopeivasted — mas'ale-ye shoma shayad hame dar jaye digar gofta shavad
RejectionReasons.replyGuide: Be Setup Guide javab dahi — agar feker konid red karde ghalbakhi bude ast, payam-e tavzih befrestid

AnonymousInfo.title: First Rioter-haye Anonymous
AnonymousInfo.subtitle: Mavrid-e being anonymous cheh ma'ni darad
AnonymousInfo.intro: Vaqti ke kasi Quiet Riot-e jadid shuruoo mikonad, anha First Quiet Rioter mishanad. In nshan-e sharf ast — nafe-i ke daliraan azaa'yeshan aval sogoo zade.
AnonymousInfo.choosingIntro: Na hame mikhahan naam-e ashaan be khosoosi be mas'ale attach shavad. In tamaman khoob ast. Vaqti ke First Quiet Rioter entekhab konand ke anonymous bemanad:
AnonymousInfo.choosingHidden: Naam va akhs-e profil-e ashaan dar safhe mas'ale penhan shavand
AnonymousInfo.choosingBadge: Namad-e anonymous neshoon dade mishavad, pas kasi bekhabar shud ke kasi on ra shuruoo kardard be bedun inekheh beshnaasand
AnonymousInfo.choosingGuides: Setup Guides hamchnan midonand ke kasi on ra shuruoo kardard (baraye moderation)
AnonymousInfo.choosingChange: First Rioter mitavanad ta'yiin-e khodet ra taghier dehad va entekhab konand ke be ezahar shenakhte shavand
AnonymousInfo.whyIntro: Besiar dalail-e moqne'e baraye baghimondegi anonymous vojud darad:
AnonymousInfo.whySensitive: Mas'ale hasas ya mojadel am ast
AnonymousInfo.whyWork: Shoma baraye sherkat-e vabaste shaghal mikonid
AnonymousInfo.whyCause: Shoma tarjih midinid ta sabab khodet sohbat konad
AnonymousInfo.whyPrivacy: Shoma sadegan az privacy tehzib mikonid
AnonymousInfo.changingP1: Agar Quiet Riot-e anonymous shuruoo kardid ammo ba'ad tasmim begirid ke shoma shenakhte shavid, mitavani har vaght preference-ye khodet ra az tarig-e inbox yaa payam-e Setup Guide update konid.

FirstRioterInfo.title: First Quiet Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.subtitle: Mana-ye Shoro-ye Yek Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.intro: Hare Quiet Riot ba yek nafar shoro Mishavad — First Quiet Rioter. In fardi ast ke skharat-e taraz dard baraye Sohbat Dar Mored Yek Masale va Shoro-ye Yek Jonbesh Baraye Tagir Basard.
FirstRioterInfo.whatIntro: Aval Boden Dar Sohbat Dar Mored Yek Masale Ba Shenasaei-ye Khass Hamrah Ast:
FirstRioterInfo.whatBadge: Yek Neshane-ye Daemi First Quiet Rioter Dar Sahfeye Masale
FirstRioterInfo.whatRecognition: Entekhar Baraye Shenasaei-ye Omomi Ya Mando Bename Khod
FirstRioterInfo.whatJoined: Uzviateye Otomatik Be Avel Nafari Ke Be Quiet Riot Pievast
FirstRioterInfo.whatNotifications: Beshovaye Vaqti Keh Pishnahsheto Barresi Shavad, Tasdiq Shavad, Ya Zende Shavad
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesTitle: First Riotars Az Che Kare Montazare Mishavand?
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesIntro: Budan First Rioter Yek Neshane-ye Sharaf Ast, Na Yak Bohran. Hich Talabe Sakhti Nist, Vali Ma Taleb Mishavim First Riotarha:
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityChampion: Masaleh Ra Ba Taraf Gereftan Dar Mian Degar Mardomani Keh Miandishand
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityEvidence: Tavahod va Hikaye Baraye Neshandan-e Masale Be Meyan Beavarid
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityWelcome: Karbaranhaye Jadid Ra Keh Be Quiet Riot Pievastandi, Khosh Amadid
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionIntro: Vaqti Yek Quiet Riot Pishnahsh Midahid, Entkhar Mikonid Che Taur Shenasaei Shavid:
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionPublic: Omomi — Nameh Va Profilee Shoma Dar Sahfeye Masale Be Avan First Rioter Neshaan Dade Mishavad
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionAnonymous: Bename Khod — Yak Neshane-ye Bename Khod Neshaan Dade Mishavad, Shomali Ra Hemayat Mikonad
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionChange: Mitvanisd Sar-o Sallam Az Hare Vaqt Az Tarighe Sandoogche Ya Tarik-e Ertebat Ba Yek Rahnama Tabdil Konid
FirstRioterInfo.howP1: Sade Yek Quiet Riot Jadid Pishnahsh Dahid Az Tarighe Wabsayt Ya WhatsApp Bot. Agar Pishnahsh Tosvar Az Soy Rahnama-ye Setup Tasdiq Shavad, Shoma First Quiet Rioter Baraye An Masale Mishavid.
FirstRioterInfo.howP2: Pishnahsh Shoma Az Marhale-ye Barresi Migzarad Ke Rahnama-ye Setup Bazi Kardosh Mikonand Ke Ba Dastoor-o Moaffaq Bashad. Rah Mitvanisd Taleb Etela'at Bishtar Konand, Pishnahad Tahdid Ba Masale-ye Mojud Konand, Ya Tasdiq Konand Zende Shavad.

Share.title: Quiet Riots Share-e Shoma
Share.profileLink: Bishtar darbare-ye Quiet Riots share-e khod biamusayid →
Share.heroSubtitle: Har Quiet Rioter dar jahaan yek share dar Quiet Riots — khod sherkat — pishnahad mishavad.
Share.ownershipDesc: Be onvane sharedarande, shoma malik-e yek bokhsh haqiqi-ye Quiet Riots hastid. In yek token, neshane, ya majazi nist — yek share haqiqi dar yek sherkat limited UK ast ke dar Companies House sabte shode.
Share.ownershipPoint1: Shoma saheb-e hoghoghi-ye Quiet Riots mishavid
Share.ownershipPoint2: Share-e shoma ba roshane sherkat arzesh ziyadi payda mikonad
Share.ownershipPoint3: Momken ast dividend dareyd agar sherkat soud taqsim konad
Share.ownershipPoint4: Shoma hoghoghi-ye sharedarande bakhshi az ghanuun-e sherkat-e UK hastid
Share.considerationDesc: Bakhshi az ghanuun-e UK (Companies Act 2006), shares nemitonan bedune baha sadour shavand. Yek parvane nominal — ke consideration namide mishavad — baraye hoghoghi bodan-e share lazem ast.
Share.considerationAmount: Consideration baraye share-e shoma 10 pence (ya mo'adel dar currency-e mahali-ye shoma) ast.
Share.considerationWallet: In az wallet-e Quiet Riots-e shoma khashe mishavad vaqti ke pish mibavid.
Share.considerationRefund: Agar darkhast-e shoma rad shavad, 10p beshekle otomatin ba wallet-e shoma bar migardad.
Share.growthSharesTitle: Aya In Kar Dar Valuation-haye Mokhtalef Chegune Anjam Mishavad
Share.growthSharesDesc: Share-e shoma az yek structure-e growth share istifade mikonad — yek class-e khas ke faghat ba balatar budan-e valuation-e sherkat mofid mishavad. In ma'ani an ast ke tax minimal dar zaman-e sadour ast.
Share.preSeedDesc: Shares ba value nominal sadour mishavand. Shoma 10p pardakht mikonid. Hichgune ruyda-ye tax ma'navi nist.
Share.seedDesc: Value yeksan-e nominal. Growth share hurdle ba valuation-e konuni tanzim mishavad.
Share.seriesADesc: Pre-emption rights baraye user share pool rad mishavad. Hurdle value-ye konuni-ra minimize mikonad.
Share.seriesBDesc: Growth share hurdle etemiman mikonad ke value-ye konuni mahdum bakhahi ast harchend valuation-e sherkat bozorg.
Share.seriesCDesc: User share pool yek percentage-e moein dar cap table ast. Hichgune nouve sadouri dilutive nist.
Share.ipoDesc: User shares be ordinary shares movasele tabdil mishavand. Captal gains tax momken ast dar zamane forokht.
Share.responsibilitiesDesc: Dashtane share ba che mas'uliati hamrah ast:
Share.responsibility1: Tax obligation baste be koone residency-e shoma — ba yek moshaver motakhasas mashvare konid
Share.responsibility2: Hichgune tazmini nist ke sherkat ba har valuation erei besad
Share.responsibility3: Structure-e share momken ast ba rosh-e sherkat taghir konad
Share.responsibility4: In yek mash'uri legal, tax, ya investment nist
Share.disclaimer1: In yek sharh-e sade ast — na yek mash'uri legal, tax, ya investment.
Share.disclaimer2: Tax obligation-e har user baste be koone residency-ye anha ast.
Share.disclaimer3: Hichgune tazmini nist ke sherkat ba har valuation erei besad.
Share.disclaimer4: Structure-e share momken ast ba rosh-e sherkat taghir konad.
Share.disclaimer5: Users bayad ba moshaverin motakhasas dar koone khod mashvare konand.
Share.eligibilityDesc: Baraye vazhegi baraye pishnahad-e share, shoma bayad:
Share.eligibilityVerified: Yek user-e mohaqqaq bashin (nam va email ya telephone tasdiq shode)
Share.eligibilityMet: Shoma baraye share-ye khod vaghegard hastid!
Share.proceedDesc: Amedeh eid ke sharedarande shavid? Consideration-e 10p az wallet-e shoma khashe khahad shod.
Share.proceedConfirm: Yek parvane 10p az wallet-e shoma khashe khahad shod. In yek talab-e legal baraye hoghoghi budan-e share ast.
Share.proceedSuccess: Darkhast-e shoma erfaal shod! Yek Share Guide be zaudi an ra barresi khahad kard.
Share.insufficientFunds: Shoma bayad hemrah-e kamtarun 10p dar wallet-e khod dasht bashid.
Share.topUpFirst: Wallet-e khod ra top up konid
Share.declineDesc: Agar na mikhahid share dasht bashid, momken ast be tarkib permanent pishnahad ra rad konid. Hichgune parvane girfate nashavad.
Share.declineConfirm: Mota'akkad hastid? In permanent ast va nemitonan bargasht dashte bashid. Shoma abadan share pishnahad namikonid.
Share.declineSuccess: Shoma pishnahad-e share ra rad kardeid.
Share.withdrawDesc: Darkhast-e khod ra logho konid va tamam 10p ra baz girin.
Share.withdrawConfirm: Mota'akkad hastid? 10p-e shoma ba wallet-e khod bar migardad.
Share.withdrawSuccess: Darkhast-e shoma bardashte shod. 10p ba wallet-e khod bar migardad.
Share.reapplyTitle: Baraye Share-e Khod Dobare Darkhast Konin
Share.reapplyDesc: Darkhast-e qabliye shoma rad shod. Shoma mitonid ba yek parvane 10p-e taze dobare darkhast konid.
Share.passwordDesc: Bakhsh-e share baraye security-ye shoma password-protected ast.
Share.passwordPlaceholder: Password-e dastresi be share ra vared konin
Share.identityDesc: Baraye takmil-e darkhast-e share-ye khod, ma bayad shenasnameh-ye khod ra tasdiq konim. In ma'lumat encrypted va ba amniyat ziyad dar rah makhzan mishavad.
Share.identityDocCountry: Kooni ke shenasnameh dar an sadour shode
Share.identitySuccess: Shenasnameh-ye shoma baraye tasdiq erfaal shod.
Share.identityMustBe18: Shoma bayad hemrah-e kamtarun 18 sal dasht bashid.
Share.issueEligibilityBanner: Shoma baraye share-ye khod vaghegard hastid
Share.issueRequestReceived: Darkhast-e shoma qabul shod. Ma ba in taraf az soye khod tamashasad dah khahim kard.

ShareGuide.title: Dashboard-e Share Guide
ShareGuide.subtitle: Darkhast-haye share ra barresi konid va lifecycle-e share ra manage konid
ShareGuide.noApplications: Hichgune darkhast dar in vaziyat nist
ShareGuide.selfReviewError: Shoma nemitonid darkhast-e khod ra barresi konid

Compliance.selfReviewError: Shoma nemitonid darkhast-e khod ra barresi konid

Team.subtitle: Midiryat-e noksanha-ye karbar va dastresi
Team.noRoles: Hiche noxsani ta be hal tayin-nashode
Team.searchPlaceholder: Jostoju-ye karbar bar asas-e nam ya email...
Team.mutualExclusive: Noxshan-hay-e Rahnomaye Hamsehm-kari va Rahnomaye Hamahangisazi ba yekdigar manafi hastand

BotMessages.noMoreReels: Video-ye nadide-ye digari baraye in mowzu vojud nadarad
BotMessages.youAreLive: Shoma zende-id! Porshur bashid amma mohtaramaneh.
BotMessages.responseSentToGuide: Pasokh-e shoma be Setup Guide ersal shod.
BotMessages.verificationEmailSent: Email-e ta'id be {email} ersal shod. Az karbar bekhahid sandugh-e vorudi khod ra barrasi konad va ru-ye link click konad.
BotMessages.verifyEmailPlaceholder: Karbar yek email-e movaghghati-ye WhatsApp darad. Az link_email baraye tanzim-e email-e vaghei estefadeh konid.
BotMessages.shareNeedMore: Baraye vajedeh sharayit shodan be {riots} Quiet Riots bishtar va {actions} eghdam bishtar niaz darid.
BotMessages.shareEligible: Shoma baraye sahm-e Quiet Riots khod vajedeh sharayit hastid! Be namayeh khod beravid ya beguyid "apply for share" baraye edameh.
BotMessages.shareQualified: Shoma baraye sahm-e Quiet Riots khod vajedeh sharayit hastid!
BotMessages.shareProgress: Pishraft: {riotsJoined}/3 Quiet Riots peyvasteh, {actionsTaken}/10 eghdam anjam shodeh{verificationNote}.
BotMessages.shareNotEligible: Shoma hanuz baraye sahm vajedeh sharayit nistid. Be Quiet Riots bishtar bepeyvandid va eghdamat-e bishtari anjam dahid.
BotMessages.shareCannotApplyStatus: Nemitavanid darkhast dahid — vaziyat-e fe'li-ye shoma {status} ast.
BotMessages.shareInsufficientBalance: Mojudi-ye kif pul nakafi ast. Hadaghal be 10p niaz darid (shoma {balance}p darid). Abetda kif pul khod ra sharzh konid.
BotMessages.sharePaymentFailed: Pardakht namowaffagh bud — lotfan dobareh talash konid.
BotMessages.shareApplied: 10p az kif pul-e shoma kasr shod. Darkhast-e sahm-e shoma aknun dar hal-e barrasi ast. Yek Share Guide be zudi an ra barrasi khahad kard.
BotMessages.shareDeclined: Shoma pishnahad-e sahm ra be towr-e da'emi rad kardid. Hich pardakhti anjam nashod. In tasmim ghabel-e bazgasht nist.
BotMessages.shareCannotDecline: Nemitavanid rad konid — ya pishnahad-e sahm-e vajedeh sharayiti nadarid ya darkhast-e shoma dar hal-e anjam ast.
BotMessages.shareWithdrawn: Darkhast-e sahm-e shoma pas gerefteh shod va 10p-ye shoma be kif pul bazgardandeh shod.
BotMessages.shareCannotWithdraw: Nemitavanid pas begirid — darkhast-e shoma momken ast dar vaziyat-e ghabel-e pas-giri nabashad.
BotMessages.shareReapplied: 10p az kif pul-e shoma kasr shod. Darkhast-e mojadad-e sahm-e shoma aknun dar hal-e barrasi ast.
BotMessages.shareCannotReapply: Nemitavanid dobareh darkhast dahid — darkhast-e shoma momken ast dar vaziyat-e rad shodeh nabashad.
BotMessages.shareQuestionSent: So'al-e shoma be tim-e Share Guide ersal shod. Pasokhi dar sandugh-e vorudi khod daryaft khahid kard.
BotMessages.suggestionApproved: Khabar-e khub — Quiet Riot-e shoma "{name}" taeed shod! Vaghti fa'al shavad be shoma ettela midahim.
BotMessages.suggestionRejectedWithLink: Pishnahad-e shoma "{name}" 👍 nagereft zira {reason}. Bishtar bedanid: https://www.quietriots.com/info/rejection-reasons
BotMessages.suggestionMerged: Pishnahad-e shoma "{name}" moshabeh yek Quiet Riot-e mojud ast. Shoma ra ezafe kardim — negah konid: {link}
BotMessages.suggestionMoreInfo: Setup Guide yek soal darbare-ye "{name}" darad: {notes}
BotMessages.suggestionGoLive: Quiet Riot-e shoma "{name}" alan fa'al ast! An ra ba dustani ke be in mowzu ahamiyat midahand be eshterak bogzarid.
BotMessages.rejectionCloseToExisting: besyar moshabeh yek Quiet Riot-e mojud
BotMessages.rejectionAboutPeople: afrad ra hadaf gharar midahad na masael ra
BotMessages.alreadyFollowing: Shoma qablan in Quiet Riot ra donbal mi-konid.
BotMessages.maxFollowsBot: Mi-tvanid ta 100 Quiet Riots ra donbal konid.

Chicken.title: Estegrar-e yek morg
Chicken.subtitle: Fardi ra dar lebas-e morg baraye tahdiye-ye peyam-e eterat-e dastnanevis-e khod be har modiraeam, siasimadar ya shakhsiat-e omumi beferestad.
Chicken.step1Desc: Be ma beguyid ke che kasi bayed peyam-e shoma ra daryaft konad va koja mi tavan anha ra yaft.
Chicken.step2Desc: Payami benevisid (ta 500 karaktar) ke morg-e ma be sorat-e dasttmi tahdie khahad dad.
Chicken.step3Desc: Fardi vaqei dar lebas-e morg payam-e shoma ra ba esbet-e aksi tahdie mi dehad.
Chicken.noDeployments: Hanuz hich esteqrar-e morgi vojud nadard. Aval-in morg-e khod ra esteqrar dehid!
Chicken.loginRequired: Baraye esteqrar-e yek morg vared shavid
Chicken.loginPrompt: Baraye ersal-e esteqrar-e morg, be yek hesab niaz darid.

ChickenDeploy.title: Esteqrar-e yek morg
ChickenDeploy.messagePlaceholder: Peyam-e eterat-e khod ra benevisid (haddagstal 500 karaktar)...
ChickenDeploy.insufficientFunds: Mojudi-ye nakafi. Lotfan aval kif-e pul-e khod ra sarez konid.
ChickenDeploy.deploySuccess: Morg esteqrar yaft! Esteqrar-e shoma dar hal-e pardazesh ast.
ChickenDeploy.deployFailed: Esteqrar namovaaffagh bud. Lotfan dobare emtehan konid.
ChickenDeploy.networkError: Khataye shabake. Lotfan ettesal-e khod ra barresi konid.

ChickenDeployments.title: Esteqrarha-ye morg-e man
ChickenDeployments.noDeployments: Hanuz hich esteqrar-e morgi vojud nadard.
ChickenDeployments.deployFirst: Aval-in morg-e khod ra esteqrar dehid
